title: Chat Calcus
description: The Calculator Mod enhances your Minecraft experience by adding a convenient calculator functionality directly into the in-game chat.
body:
# Calculator Mod
## Summary:
The Calculator Mod enhances your Minecraft experience by adding a convenient calculator functionality directly into the in-game chat. Perform complex mathematical calculations without ever leaving the game! Whether you're calculating resource requirements for your builds or solving intricate equations, the Calculator Mod has you covered. Keep in mind this is very simply coded and cant do everything!

## Key Features:
- In-Game Calculator: Access a fully functional calculator directly in the Minecraft chat.
- Arithmetic Operations: Perform addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division effortlessly.
- Mathematical Functions: Access a wide range of mathematical functions such as square root, absolute value, trigonometric functions, logarithms, and more.
- Help Menu: View available functions, operators, and usage instructions conveniently within the game.
- Easy Installation: Simple installation process using Fabric Loader and Fabric API.
  
## Why Choose Calculator Mod? 
The Calculator Mod offers unparalleled convenience for Minecraft players who frequently need to perform mathematical calculations while playing. Say goodbye to tabbing out of the game to use an external calculator and hello to seamless in-game calculations!
